notes: P63 defines probe queue items only. It does not implement a runtime queue, persistent queue, worker, connector execution, source cache mutation, evidence ledger mutation, candidate-index mutation, local-index mutation, master-index mutation, telemetry, public query logging, external calls, or live probe execution.

P64 defines candidate index records as contract-only provisional review items; probe queue items still do not create candidates, execute probes, mutate source cache, mutate evidence ledger, or mutate the master index.
Probe queue items are future work requests derived from privacy-filtered search needs and other query-intelligence refs. They are not evidence, candidates, source truth, or authoritative truth.
P66 Known Absence Page v0 is future/contract-only and does not add runtime pages, telemetry, probes, or mutation.

P67 Query Privacy and Poisoning Guard v0 is future/contract-only and adds no runtime guard, telemetry, account/IP tracking, query-intelligence mutation, index mutation, external calls, or live probes.
P68 demand dashboard remains future/contract-only and may use only privacy-filtered, poisoning-guarded aggregate inputs; no runtime aggregation, telemetry, real demand claim, or mutation is added.
P69 source sync workers remain future/contract-only; no public-query fanout, connector runtime, source cache/evidence ledger mutation, candidate mutation, or index mutation is added.
